Package neqsim.process.diagnostics

Class SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.diagnostics.SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
SimulationVerifier
private static class SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result object for a simulation perturbation attempt.

  • Constructor Details

    • PerturbationResult

      private PerturbationResult(boolean applied, String changedVariable, String description)
      Creates a perturbation result.
      Parameters:
      applied - true if the process was changed
      changedVariable - changed variable name
      description - human-readable description

  • Method Details

    • applied

      private static SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult applied(String changedVariable, String description)
      Creates an applied result.

      changedVariable - changed variable name
      description - human-readable description
      Returns:
      applied perturbation result

      Returns:
      not-applied perturbation result
